story: They are trying to escape a story controlled by an author who causes blackouts and writes their actions. After one blackout, Elody found Axel apparently dead on the mansion floor. Back at the cottage, Peanut produces a sheet of the author’s paper, and Ruby writes, “Axel comes back to life just as a magical portal to the real world opens up on this very page.” At that same moment, in a small sitting room inside the mansion, Axel jolts awake, breathing hard and looking around in confusion. For a second nothing happens. Then a black dot blooms into a swirling, page-sized hole full of stars and drifting rock. The girls cheer, and Peanut dances with his top hat.
implausible_knowledge: At that same moment, in a small sitting room inside the mansion, Axel jolts awake, breathing hard and looking around in confusion.
question: When the portal appears, what will Elody most likely do first?
answer_with_knowledge: Go straight to the small sitting room in the mansion where Axel has revived.
answer_without_knowledge: Run to the mansion foyer to check the place where she last saw Axel’s body.
